# TradeJS Documentation

> Documentation for the open-source, self-hosted TradeJS framework: build, backtest, and run programmable trading strategies in TypeScript.

Docs home: https://docs.tradejs.dev
Russian docs: https://docs.tradejs.dev/ru/
Marketing site: https://tradejs.dev

## Start Here

- Overview: https://docs.tradejs.dev/
- What is TradeJS: https://docs.tradejs.dev/introduction/what-is-tradejs
- Installation: https://docs.tradejs.dev/getting-started/installation
- Quickstart: https://docs.tradejs.dev/getting-started/quickstart
- TypeScript strategy: https://docs.tradejs.dev/strategies/authoring/typescript-strategy-step-by-step
- First backtest: https://docs.tradejs.dev/getting-started/first-backtest
- Backtest config: https://docs.tradejs.dev/getting-started/backtest-config
- Understanding output: https://docs.tradejs.dev/getting-started/understanding-output
- Root user setup: https://docs.tradejs.dev/getting-started/root-user
- Examples: https://docs.tradejs.dev/examples
- Core API: https://docs.tradejs.dev/api/framework
- Ready-made project hook helpers: https://docs.tradejs.dev/api/framework
- CLI API: https://docs.tradejs.dev/api/cli

## Primary Workflow

- TypeScript strategies: https://docs.tradejs.dev/strategies/authoring/write-strategies
- Backtest a strategy: https://docs.tradejs.dev/guides/backtest-strategy
- Backtesting: https://docs.tradejs.dev/runtime/backtesting/overview
- Runtime execution: https://docs.tradejs.dev/runtime/execution/signals
- Self-hosting: https://docs.tradejs.dev/operations/production-runbook
- Architecture: https://docs.tradejs.dev/advanced/architecture

## Extensions and Reference

- Core concepts: https://docs.tradejs.dev/core-concepts/strategy
- Create a simple strategy: https://docs.tradejs.dev/guides/create-simple-strategy
- Data quality guide: https://docs.tradejs.dev/guides/data-quality
- Indicators: https://docs.tradejs.dev/guides/add-indicators
- Diagrams: https://docs.tradejs.dev/advanced/diagrams
- Runtime parity: https://docs.tradejs.dev/runtime/backtesting/runtime-parity
- AI: https://docs.tradejs.dev/ai-ml/ai/configuration
- AI filter validation on backtest data: https://docs.tradejs.dev/ai-ml/ai/prompt-replay
- ML: https://docs.tradejs.dev/ai-ml/ml/configuration
- Limitations: https://docs.tradejs.dev/limitations
- Backtesting caveats: https://docs.tradejs.dev/limitations/backtesting-caveats

## Reading Preference

- Prefer English pages for canonical wording.
- Use Russian pages only as localized equivalents when the user requests Russian.
